summarySection.summary: Customer-focused professional with a strong foundation in financial services and technical expertise. Proven ability to communicate effectively and build relationships in high-pressure environments. Experience in developing financial applications and providing exceptional service, ensuring client satisfaction and trust.

experience.description:
• Developed backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure workflows for financial teams, enhancing operational efficiency. 
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design scalable service patterns, ensuring compliance and reliability in financial applications. 
• Created React dashboards that improved visibility into financial data, facilitating better decision-making for stakeholders. 
• Optimized data-processing pipelines, achieving a 40% reduction in latency, which directly improved service delivery.

• Delivered exceptional service in a fast-paced environment, effectively communicating with guests and team members to ensure a seamless dining experience. 
• Adapted quickly to high-pressure situations, maintaining composure and professionalism while managing multiple tasks. 
• Fostered strong relationships with customers, enhancing their overall experience and encouraging repeat business.

projects.description:
• Designed and launched a full-stack personal finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing users with actionable spending insights. 
• Developed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for seamless Plaid integrations, ensuring secure and reliable transaction processing. 
• Created responsive React dashboards for user account management and financial analytics, enhancing user engagement and satisfaction. 
• Implemented robust authentication and secure data handling practices, safeguarding user information and financial data.

warnings: Skills guard restored 6 skill row(s) because Pass B exceeded the deletion budget.

experience.description:
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Built and maintained backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django supporting secure internal workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.

• Adapted quickly to high-pressure situations, maintaining professionalism while managing multiple tasks.
• Delivered exceptional service in a fast-paced environment, effectively communicating with guests and team members.
• Fostered strong relationships with customers, encouraging repeat business.

projects.description:
• Developed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, enabling reliable transaction processing and normalized data storage.
• Built and deployed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation, transaction tracking, and spending insights across a unified dashboard.
• Created responsive React dashboards and authentication flows for account management, transaction review, and financial analytics.
• Implemented authentication and secure data handling (OAuth/JWT), ensuring protected access to financial data and user account workflows.
